name: apodictic
description: APODICTIC Development Editor. Developmental editing that listens before diagnosing. Provides structural diagnosis, genre calibration, tag audits, plot architecture analysis, revision coaching, partial manuscript diagnostic, fragment synthesis, pre-writing pathway, and intake routing across 11 core passes, 33 available audits (3 universal, 15 craft, 10 genre, 5 tag), 4 research modes, 1 pre-writing pathway, and 1 intake router. Includes contract-driven and finding-driven audit integration pipeline.
